The '''New Republic Obelisk''' was a monument located on the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]<ref name="Eclipse" /> by [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' to [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].</ref> A tall and thin needle made out of stone, the Obelisk was constructed in order to symbolize the unity of the New Republic.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|376|New Republic Obelisk}}</ref> [[Kuati/Legends|Kuati]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Viqi Shesh]]'s [[Shesh's office|office]] featured a grand view of both the obelisk and the avenue [[Commerce Way (Coruscant)|Commerce Way]].<ref name="Eclipse" />

==Behind the scenes==
The New Republic Obelisk first appeared in [[James Luceno]]'s novel [[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse|''Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse'']], which was released in [[2000]] as an installment of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series.<ref name="Eclipse" />
